Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Founder-Archarya..Sampradaya -Archarya,terms which mean what in preaching terms ?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2009-11-09 · 7 answers
How should Prabhupada Disciples and their natural diksa descendents veiw these terms?
user [154] · 2009-11-09
Founder-Archarya is Founder-Archarya of International Society for Krishna Consciousness. Those who are not members of ISKCON or are former members try very hard to retain some sense of connection to Srila Prabhupada outside of this framework. Thus they invent terms and titles that have not been approved by Srila Prabhupada himself. These include Sampradaya-acarya, Acarya-avatara etc. However the core of SP instruction is to stay within the society, that has only one Founder Acharya.
user [451] · 2009-11-09
Founder- Acarya-avatara ACBSP Ki Jaya!

How about that? Pretty cool,eh!

Or

Jagat-Guru ACBSP Ki Jaya!

Is that another one that Prabhupada supposely disapproved.

Jaya! Jaya! Jaya!
user [38] · 2009-11-09
Agreed with ccd. SP didnt like jagad guru due to being connected to mayavadi sannyasis. (CC 1.7.64 p., etc.)
user [459] · 2009-11-12
Silver spoons rasa update.......especially for ccd to encourage himSrila Prabhupada to gurukripa swami.....vrindavan he said '93My guru ordered me to go to the west, and I did
that. My main service was to translate these books and I did that. I
have a personal desire to build these temples in India. That is my
personal program. But they (his disciples) will not give me money and
my head is getting hot. I have to translate these books, write many
letters, and I am thinking how to raise the money to build these
temples because my disciples have their own programs and will not give
me money.'94 So, seeing SP like this, I told him that from today forth,
you just translate the books peacefully, and I will take the headache
and go and get the money. When I walked out of the room, I could not
believe what I just said........
user [459] · 2009-11-12
Srila Prabhupada told me in the car in New Zealand, he turned to me in the car, and
said, while you were building Krishna Balarama temple in Vrindavan.
Krishna was building you a house in Goloka. I have seen it, it is very
nice. ....Silver spoons rasa....
user [459] · 2009-11-12
Such a wonderful personal pastime between guru kripa das and our founder- Archarya ...srila Prabhupada.....
user [451] · 2009-11-12
"Everyone is sleeping in the darkness of Kali-yuga, but when there is a great acarya, by his calling only, everyone takes to the study of the Vedas to acquire actual knowledge." (Srila Prabhupada, Krsna Book C. 20)
